title: FreakPVP texture pack
description: A PVP texture pack for 1.20.1, based on CPVP and Sword PVP, themed around pink.
body:
# FreakPVP
## Overview

FreakPVP is a competitive PvP resource pack for Minecraft 1.20–1.20.1, originally created for the FreakWorld server.
While designed to match the server’s style and gameplay, the pack is freely available for anyone to use.

The pack focuses on clarity, minimalism, and performance, making it ideal for Sword & Crystal PvP.

## Features

**FreakPVP includes a wide range of visual optimizations, such as:**

Short swords for improved visibility

Low fire and low shield textures

Clearer critical hit particles

Improved respawn anchor visuals

Smaller totem and reduced totem pop particles

Cleaner armor trims

Smaller ender pearls

Smaller golden apples

_…and many additional refinements designed to reduce visual clutter and improve combat readability._
